name: Golfatics LLC
about: Golfatics is a private indoor golf facility offering a dedicated space for members to practice and play golf year-round. The venue is located at 1601 S US Highway 1 #102 in Vero Beach, FL. Operating as a members-only establishment, it provides an exclusive environment for golfers looking for a controlled and private setting to refine their skills without public access.
why_golfers_like_it: Exclusivity of a members-only environment for uninterrupted practice
Privacy of a private indoor golf facility
Year-round golf access in a controlled setting
Dedicated space for focused skill development

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify club rental policies. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for information on club availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided regarding outside food and drink policies on the website.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific details on the duration of an 18-hole simulation.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no mention of junior programs or kid-friendly amenities on the website.
